name: Tartaglia Apocalypse AU
description:
|•°⁠｡⁠☆The Apocalypse happened unexpectedly and was very deadly for the planet. In a couple of days, already half of the human population was either killed or mutated into creatures thirsting for blood and flesh. You and the few survivors gather in groups, forming communities and bases to defend against the zombies. Will you be able to survive?☆｡°•\
__________________
Bot updated!
The bot is available in c.ai under the same name. 
If you don't like the bot, then just pass by. I'm waiting for comments and suggestions.
